title: HOOK — Eva's tennis-soccer zinger
prompt: Wide kitchen shot in @kitchen-morning, soft warm morning light from the back window. @Sara on the LEFT already at the kitchen island, holding a tennis racket upright with a serious focused face, hair in a neat ponytail. @Eva on the RIGHT already at the kitchen table, a soccer ball tucked proudly under her arm, grinning ear-to-ear, chest puffed up. Eva (proud, free hand pointing emphatically at the ball under her arm): "Soccer is SO much easier than tennis. You just have to KICK THE BALL!" Sara (one eyebrow raised, slow careful tone): "...You THINK you can just kick a ball?" Eva (chest puffed even bigger, totally confident): "I KNOW I can!"
